title: Create /audit page — show audit notes linked to the current workspace/board
acceptance_criteria: A new page exists at app/pages/audit.vue and is accessible at /audit
The page shows a list of audit notes from vault.auditNotes, each with: id, message, source, confidence, createdAt, and the linked taskId
When vault.auditNotes is empty, the page shows a clear empty state: 'No audit notes recorded yet'
The navigation item 'Audit' in WorkspaceNav.vue links to /audit
The page follows the same visual style as the approvals.vue page (section cards, eyebrow labels, etc.)
completion_summary: Added a real /audit route backed by canonical audit notes and updated navigation so the Audit item links there.
